channel.title: 网页解析 on Mark's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in 网页解析 on Mark's Blog

item.title: python Html parse
item.description:
若从浏览器获得的xpath 为

//*[@id="contenttable"]/tbody/tr/td/table/tbody/tr/td[2]/h3

则 lxml_tree.xpath 的 参数应为：

浏览器 : //*[@id="contenttable"]/tbody/tr/td/table/tbody/tr/td[2]/h3
lxml_tree.xpath : //*[@id="contenttable"]///tr/td/table///tr/td[2]/h3

from lxml import html

xpath_content = lxml_tree.xpath('//*[@id="contenttable"]//tr/td/table//tr/td[2]/h3')
